ToolboxOptions.Summary: MATLAB implementation of ndi.ontology classes for looking up terms across biological and scientific ontologies
ToolboxOptions.Description: Provides a unified interface (ndi.ontology.lookup) for querying ontology terms from CL, UBERON, CHEBI, PATO, NCBITaxon, NCIm, NCIT, OM, PubChem, RRID, SNOMED, EFO, EDAM, EMPTY, NDIC, and WBStrain. Part of the NDI (Neuroscience Data Interface) ecosystem.
